title: SICP 2.5.3 polynomial arithmetic
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch2_polynomial_arithmetic.esk covering polynomial representation, term lists, add/mul, generic dispatch integration, and symbolic algebra examples from SICP 2.5.3.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch2_polynomial_arithmetic_r and sicp_ch2_polynomial_arithmetic_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Completes the polynomial/symbolic algebra branch of the SICP generic arithmetic chapter.
